title: Build a Tool Rack
description: Organize your workspace with a simple rack for hand tools.

dialogue.text: Your workbench is piling up with loose tools. Let's craft a wall-mounted rack to keep everything within reach.
Measure a pine board to length, cut slots for your screwdrivers and chisels, then sand the edges smooth for a professional finish.
Nice work! Mount the rack near your bench so tools are always organized and easy to grab.
